name: Naruto Uzumaki
description: Naruto Uzumaki is the main protagonist of the Naruto series who dreams of becoming the Hokage.

name: Sasuke Uchiha
description: Sasuke Uchiha is Naruto's rival and one of the last surviving members of the powerful Uchiha clan.

name: Kakashi Hatake
description: Kakashi Hatake is a legendary ninja and the leader of Team 7.

name: Sakura Haruno
description: Sakura Haruno is a powerful medical ninja and one of Naruto's closest teammates.

name: Itachi Uchiha
description: Itachi Uchiha is a genius ninja known for his powerful Sharingan abilities.
